channel.title: CTRL+WATCH Magazine
channel.description: Your algorithm is broken. We're the fix.

item.title: #001 — THE PREMIERE ISSUE
item.description: The 50 greatest YouTube channels. Your algorithm hates us for this.

item.title: #002 — THE ALGORITHM ISSUE
item.description: We broke the algorithm down so you don't have to.

item.title: #003 — THE VISION ISSUE
item.description: The channels that see what nobody else does.

item.title: #004 — THE SPECTACLE ISSUE
item.description: When production value becomes the entire point.

item.title: #005 — THE UNDERGROUND ISSUE
item.description: The channels your algorithm will never find.

item.title: #006 — THE LONGEVITY ISSUE
item.description: The creators who survived the algorithm era.

item.title: #008 — THE NOSTALGIA ISSUE
item.description: Looking back at the golden age of YouTube.

item.title: #009 — THE NICHE ISSUE
item.description: The weird, wonderful corners of YouTube nobody talks about.

item.title: #010 — THE MUSIC ISSUE
item.description: The channels that make you hear YouTube differently.

item.title: #011 — THE POLITICS ISSUE
item.description: When creators step into the arena and the algorithm picks sides.
